details.test: Task 1: Join cheapest individual crew voting membership under $120
Task 2: Register for two evening sustainability webinars under $50 and proceed to checkout
Task 3: Buy three printed guides (safety, sustainability, business) under $30 with free shipping and 4+ stars
Task 4 (adapted): Register as non-member for next sustainability training event and proceed to checkout
Task 5: Send policy message on marine protected areas to both Senators using Take Action tool
Task 6: Save two full-time Pacific deckhand jobs with salary >= $40,000 to favorites
Task 7: Compare three MSC-certified salmon processors within 50 miles of ZIP 98101
Task 8 (adapted): Enroll in highest-rated online bycatch reduction training under $75 and proceed to checkout
Task 9: Set up quota alerts for Atlantic cod and Pacific halibut with 10% threshold and daily summaries
